title: Panic on multi-byte UTF-8 in OG description truncation
description: In activitypub.rs line 417, the OG description is truncated with &plain_text[..197]. This is byte-indexed slicing, which panics if byte 197 falls inside a multi-byte UTF-8 character (e.g., emoji, CJK, accented characters). Fix: use .chars().take(197).collect::<String>() or a char-boundary-aware truncation like the truncate_str() helper already defined in inbox.rs.
